criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and engagement facilitated by the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app analytics, download statistics.

criteria.name: Feature Diversity
criteria.description: The variety and richness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, developer websites, user reviews.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The uniqueness and novelty of the app's offerings in the entertainment sector.
criteria.sources: Industry reviews, app descriptions, developer announcements.

criteria.name: Market Presence
criteria.description: The app's popularity and reach within the market.
criteria.sources: Download statistics, user reviews, industry reports.
